title: centaurea × johannae
intro: Centaurea × johannae is a hybrid plant species, known as a cross between Centaurea montana and Centaurea dilatata. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea × johannae is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried flower, which can be used to create various medicinal preparations.
